categories.name: Titles & Navigation
categories.description: Section and topic headings — choose one per segment transition

categories.name: Text Screens
categories.description: Speaker intros, data slides, disclaimer, informational overlays

types.name: Disclaimer
types.description: Full-screen disclaimer on dark blurred background. Title in uppercase serif. First paragraph highlighted in yellow accent. Remaining text in standard gray.
types.when: Opening of every video — legal and financial disclaimers. Required for investment-related content, market analysis, and property recommendations.
types.max_text: Title: 1 word. Highlight: 1-2 sentences. Body: 2-3 sentences.

types.name: Speaker Intro
types.description: Full-screen speaker video with dark lower-third overlay panel in bottom-left. Yellow accent line on top of overlay. Name in uppercase serif, role/company in light sans-serif.
types.when: First appearance of host or guest expert. Introduce broker name, title, company, and credentials.

types.name: CTA / QR Code
types.description: Split layout: 45% dark panel (left) with title, QR code, and 'Link in Description' + yellow arrow; 55% speaker video (right).
types.when: End of video or mid-roll CTA. Drive viewers to website, WhatsApp, consultation booking, or Golden Visa calculator.

types.name: Side Slide — Text
types.description: Split layout: 55% dark text panel (left) with serif title, body text with yellow highlighted keywords, and muted footnote; 45% speaker video (right).
types.when: Key facts, comparisons, area data, ROI numbers, process steps with explanations. Any content requiring the viewer to read while the speaker explains.
types.max_text: Title: 2-4 words. Body: 3-5 sentences. Footnote: 1 line. Yellow highlights: max 3 per slide.

types.name: Section Title
types.description: Full speaker video with semi-transparent dark overlay. Large centered serif title in uppercase white with text shadow. High-impact, cinematic feel.
types.when: Start of a new major section or chapter in the video. High-impact topic transitions between content segments.
types.max_text: 2-4 words, ALL CAPS. No body text.

types.name: Text Screen
types.description: Dark gradient background, no speaker. Serif title top-left in italic uppercase. Body text with yellow-highlighted key data points. Clean, editorial layout for dense information.
types.when: Data-heavy content without speaker: market statistics, comparison tables, regulatory information, timelines, area overviews.
types.max_text: Title: 2-4 words. Body: 4-6 sentences. Yellow highlights: max 3 per screen.

types.name: Section Title Centered
types.description: Dark gradient background, no speaker. Centered serif title with one accent-colored keyword in yellow. Muted italic subtitle below. Minimalist and focused.
types.when: Lighter section transitions, sub-topics within a chapter, thematic breaks. Less dramatic than the full Section Title.
types.max_text: Title: 2-4 words (1 highlighted). Subtitle: 1 short sentence.
